heading: Federal laws guaranteeing civil rights
label: 2396 Federal laws guaranteeing civil rights
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to be inconsistent with applicable Federal law prohibiting discrimination on the basis of race, color, sex, national origin, age, or disability in the provision of Federal programs or services.
